title: Toy Biz My Pal 2 — electronics and mechanism repair
description: Toy Biz My Pal 2 talking robot — gearbox, motor, and wiring repair so face movement, games, and voice work again.
itemDetails:
Toy Biz My Pal 2 talking robot (circa 1991–1993) was marketed as an interactive playmate: voice-activated speech, chest buttons for games such as Simon Says, and motorized face parts (eyes, ears, nose, mouth).

The shell uses blue, yellow, and white moulded plastic with a clear dome head. Internally: DC motor, multi-stage gearboxes, tension springs for articulation, and a wiring harness to the head dome. After decades, stripped gears, broken spring mounts, loose wires, and corroded contacts are common.
